data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Unblocked/in-progress epics that are dependencies of blocked epics have a 5th tab-separated field containing BLOCKING
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh 2>&1 | grep -E 'Test 3[456]' | grep -c PASS | grep -q 3
- [ ] Epics that do NOT block others have exactly 4 fields (no extra field)
- [ ] Existing tests 1-33 continue to pass (no regressions)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh 2>&1 | grep 'Results:' | grep -q '36 passed, 0 failed'
- [ ] BLOCKING marker data comes from existing deps/index data — no new data source

## File Impact
- Source: plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh (modify Python block)
- Test: tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh (RED tests 34-36 must turn GREEN)
